# BACKEND DESIGN: Inventra — Products API
Generated by: Forge Backend Agent  
Date: May 19, 2026

---

## API Contract

### GET /api/products
```
Purpose: List products with pagination, search, and filters
Auth: Required (Bearer token)
Rate limit: 100 requests/minute per user

Query params:
  page      integer  min:1          default:1
  pageSize  integer  min:1 max:100  default:25
  q         string   max:200        optional  (searches name, sku)
  status    string   enum:[active,inactive,draft,archived]  optional
  sort      string   enum:[name:asc,name:desc,price:asc,price:desc,
                           stock:asc,stock:desc,updatedAt:asc,updatedAt:desc]
                     default:updatedAt:desc

Response 200:
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
      "name": "Kemeja Oxford Slim Fit Navy",
      "sku": "KEM-OXF-NVY-M",
      "categoryId": "cat-uuid-001",
      "categoryName": "Tops",
      "price": 285000,
      "stock": 47,
      "reorderPoint": 5,
      "status": "active",
      "notes": null,
      "createdAt": "2026-01-15T08:30:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-05-19T14:22:00.000Z"
    }
  ],
  "error": null,
  "meta": {
    "total": 143,
    "page": 1,
    "pageSize": 25,
    "totalPages": 6
  }
}

Response 401: { "data": null, "error": "Authentication required" }
Response 429: { "data": null, "error": "Rate limit exceeded. Try again in 60 seconds." }
```

### POST /api/products
```
Purpose: Create a new product
Auth: Required

Request body:
{
  "name":         string   required  min:2  max:120
  "sku":          string   required  min:1  max:50  pattern:/^[A-Z0-9-_]+$/i
  "categoryId":   string   optional  uuid
  "price":        integer  required  min:0  max:999999999
  "stock":        integer  optional  min:0  default:0
  "reorderPoint": integer  optional  min:0  default:5
  "status":       string   optional  enum:[active,inactive,draft]  default:active
  "notes":        string   optional  max:500
}

Response 201: { "data": { ...product }, "error": null }
Response 400: { "data": null, "error": "Validation failed",
               "fields": { "sku": "SKU can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens" } }
Response 409: { "data": null, "error": "SKU already exists" }
```

### PATCH /api/products/:id
```
Purpose: Update product (partial update)
Auth: Required

Path params:
  :id  UUID v4  required

Request body: Same as POST but all fields optional

Response 200: { "data": { ...updatedProduct }, "error": null }
Response 404: { "data": null, "error": "Product not found" }
```

### DELETE /api/products/:id
```
Purpose: Delete product and all its stock movements
Auth: Required

Response 200: { "data": { "success": true }, "error": null }
Response 404: { "data": null, "error": "Product not found" }
```

### POST /api/products/:id/stock-movements
```
Purpose: Record a stock movement (sale, restock, adjustment)
Auth: Required

Request body:
{
  "type":     string   required  enum:[sale,restock,adjustment]
  "quantity": integer  required  min:1
  "note":     string   optional  max:200
}

Business rules:
  - sale: quantity must not exceed current stock
  - restock: no upper limit
  - adjustment: can be positive or negative (use negative for corrections)

Response 201:
{
  "data": {
    "movement": { ...movementRecord },
    "product": { ...updatedProduct }  // includes new stock value
  },
  "error": null
}
Response 400: { "data": null, "error": "Insufficient stock. Current stock: 3, requested: 5" }
```

---

## Database Schema

```sql
-- Enable UUID generation
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "pgcrypto";

-- ── USERS (managed by Supabase Auth) ─────────────────────────
-- auth.users table is managed by Supabase
-- We reference it via user_id in our tables

-- ── CATEGORIES ───────────────────────────────────────────────
CREATE TABLE categories (
  id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id     UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name        VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL,
  color       VARCHAR(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT '#6B7280'
              CHECK (color ~ '^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$'),
  created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at  TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_categories_user_id ON categories(user_id);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_categories_name_unique ON categories(user_id, name);

-- ── PRODUCTS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
CREATE TABLE products (
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id       UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  category_id   UUID REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  name          VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
  sku           VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  price         INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
                CHECK (price >= 0),
  stock         INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
                CHECK (stock >= 0),
  reorder_point INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 5
                CHECK (reorder_point >= 0),
  status        VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active'
                CHECK (status IN ('active', 'inactive', 'draft', 'archived')),
  notes         TEXT CHECK (char_length(notes) <= 500),
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Indexes (every FK + every filtered/sorted column)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_user_id     ON products(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_products_category_id ON products(category_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_products_status      ON products(user_id, status);
CREATE INDEX idx_products_updated_at  ON products(user_id, updated_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_products_name_search ON products USING gin(to_tsvector('simple', name));
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_products_sku_unique ON products(user_id, sku);

-- ── STOCK MOVEMENTS ──────────────────────────────────────────
CREATE TABLE stock_movements (
  id           UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id      UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  product_id   UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  type         VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL
               CHECK (type IN ('sale', 'restock', 'adjustment')),
  quantity     INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (quantity != 0),
  stock_before INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (stock_before >= 0),
  stock_after  INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (stock_after >= 0),
  note         VARCHAR(200),
  created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
  -- No updated_at: movements are immutable
);

CREATE INDEX idx_movements_product_id ON stock_movements(product_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_movements_user_id    ON stock_movements(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_movements_created_at ON stock_movements(product_id, created_at DESC);

-- ── TRIGGERS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
-- Auto-update updated_at
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_updated_at()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
  NEW.updated_at = NOW();
  RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

CREATE TRIGGER products_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON products
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();

CREATE TRIGGER categories_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON categories
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();

-- ── ROW LEVEL SECURITY ────────────────────────────────────────
ALTER TABLE products ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE categories ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE stock_movements ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

-- Users can only see/modify their own data
CREATE POLICY "products_user_isolation" ON products
  USING (user_id = auth.uid())
  WITH CHECK (user_id = auth.uid());

CREATE POLICY "categories_user_isolation" ON categories
  USING (user_id = auth.uid())
  WITH CHECK (user_id = auth.uid());

CREATE POLICY "movements_user_isolation" ON stock_movements
  USING (user_id = auth.uid())
  WITH CHECK (user_id = auth.uid());
```

---

## Validation Schema (Zod)

```javascript
// src/validators/product.validator.js
import { z } from 'zod'

export const createProductSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string({ required_error: 'Product name is required' })
    .min(2, 'Name must be at least 2 characters')
    .max(120, 'Name must be 120 characters or less')
    .trim(),

  sku: z.string({ required_error: 'SKU is required' })
    .min(1, 'SKU cannot be empty')
    .max(50, 'SKU must be 50 characters or less')
    .regex(/^[A-Z0-9\-_]+$/i, 'SKU can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores')
    .trim()
    .toUpperCase(),

  categoryId: z.string().uuid('Invalid category').nullable().optional(),

  price: z.number({ required_error: 'Price is required', invalid_type_error: 'Price must be a number' })
    .int('Price must be a whole number (no decimals)')
    .min(0, 'Price cannot be negative')
    .max(999_999_999, 'Price is too large'),

  stock: z.number().int().min(0, 'Stock cannot be negative').default(0),
  reorderPoint: z.number().int().min(0).default(5),
  status: z.enum(['active', 'inactive', 'draft']).default('active'),
  notes: z.string().max(500).nullable().optional(),
})

export const updateProductSchema = createProductSchema.partial()

export const stockMovementSchema = z.object({
  type: z.enum(['sale', 'restock', 'adjustment']),
  quantity: z.number().int().min(1, 'Quantity must be at least 1'),
  note: z.string().max(200).optional(),
})
```

---

## Query Plan (N+1 Analysis)

```sql
-- ✅ List products with category name (1 query, JOIN)
SELECT
  p.id, p.name, p.sku, p.price, p.stock, p.reorder_point,
  p.status, p.notes, p.created_at, p.updated_at,
  c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id
WHERE p.user_id = $1
  AND ($2::text IS NULL OR p.status = $2)
  AND ($3::text IS NULL OR (
    p.name ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%' OR
    p.sku ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
  ))
ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC
LIMIT $4 OFFSET $5;

-- ✅ Count for pagination (separate query, uses index)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p
WHERE p.user_id = $1
  AND ($2::text IS NULL OR p.status = $2)
  AND ($3::text IS NULL OR (
    p.name ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%' OR
    p.sku ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
  ));

-- ✅ Record stock movement + update product stock (transaction)
BEGIN;
  -- Verify sufficient stock for sales
  SELECT stock FROM products WHERE id = $1 AND user_id = $2 FOR UPDATE;
  -- (application checks stock >= quantity for sales)

  INSERT INTO stock_movements (user_id, product_id, type, quantity, stock_before, stock_after, note)
  VALUES ($2, $1, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
  RETURNING *;

  UPDATE products
  SET stock = $6, updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE id = $1 AND user_id = $2
  RETURNING *;
COMMIT;
```

---

## Security Checklist

```
✅ Input validated with Zod on every endpoint
✅ Auth required on all endpoints (Supabase JWT)
✅ Row Level Security enforces user isolation
✅ No user-provided IDs trusted (always use auth.uid())
✅ SKU uniqueness enforced at DB level (unique index)
✅ Stock cannot go negative (CHECK constraint)
✅ No sensitive data in API responses
✅ Rate limiting configured (100 req/min)
✅ Error messages are user-friendly (no SQL errors exposed)
✅ Stock movements are immutable (no UPDATE/DELETE)
```
